![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mtowelwash2-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

TOWELWASH

## Exterior / Interior / Preparation

### Dedicated microfibre wash detergent.

Q²M TowelWash is a specialised detergent designed to clean and maintain microfibre towels. It removes dirt, polishing residues and product build up while preserving the fibres’ softness and absorbency.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_towel-wash_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Superb microfiber and wool washing aid.

Q²M TowelWash extends the life and performance of microfibre towels by cleaning them thoroughly without damaging the fibres. Proper washing ensures towels remain safe and effective for detailing tasks.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons25.svg)

HIGHLY CONCENTRATED FORMULA 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons24.svg)

HAND AND MACHINE WASH 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons19.svg)

FOR ALL FABRICS 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mtowelwash.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML

Consumption

30ml/wash

PH LEVEL

NEUTRAL

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

TOWELWASH

01
Shake towels to remove loose debris. 

02
Add 15/30ml of Q²M TowelWash to the washing machine. Do not overuse it. 

03
Wash on a gentle cycle with warm water. 

04
Do not use fabric softener or bleach. 

05
Air dry. 

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Can Q²M TowelWash be used for all microfibres? 

Yes. It is suitable for all detailing towels.

02
Does it remove polish and coating residue? 

It will break down polish residue, but coating towels should not be reused.

03
Can it be used in a washing machine? 

Yes. It is machine safe.

04
Should fabric softener be used? 

No. Fabric softener should be avoided.

05
Does it help towels last longer? 

Yes. Proper cleaning preserves fibre structure.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000265518-Q-M-TowelWash)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
